title: Nestlé Nigeria and FBRA: Closing the Loop in Nigeria’s Waste Management Ecosystem - FinancialEDGE
description: As Nigeria’s population continues to grow, estimated by the United Nations Population Fund to reach over 237 million by 2025 so does the volume of waste generated across the country.
